options.name: --budget
options.description:
API budget $ amount. If using paid API's this will limit
the cost of the agent, and will stop after the budget is reached.

options.name: --cli
options.description:
Use CLI only. This will disable the web interface and use
the CLI for all interactions.

options.name: --connection
options.description:
If using a local model, you can configure the path it is
available at. Example:
"https://localhost:11434/v1;models=llama3.1:8b;token=<apitoken>". If you
provide multiple models, separate them with a comma.

options.name: --ollama-model
options.description:
Override the ollama models to provide. Default is
llama3.1:8b. If you provide multiple models, pass multiple times.

options.name: --ollama-path
options.description:
If hosting ollama anywhere but http://localhost:11434,
specify it here.

options.name: --port
options.description:
Specify the port to use for the web interface. By default
it will bind to any available port.

options.name: --token
options.description:
Your inference API key(s).' Supported providers are OpenAI,
Anthropic, Groq, Cerebras and SambaNova. You can specify this multiple times if
you have more than one provider.
